context: A girl stands quietly on a lush island as the camera reveals the vast sea around her.

actions.description: Low angle view frames the girl against sky and greenery as she looks toward the horizon.
Camera begins to pull away, widening from her figure to the plants and shoreline around her.
The full island and deep blue sea come into view while the girl remains a small calm figure.
